programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is forced to find a new partner for the junkyard when Lamont seeks employment elsewhere.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.sub-title: Sanford and Son and Sister Makes Three
programme.desc: Lamont discovers that his new fiancee may actually be his half sister.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: A bum threatens to sue Fred when he accidentally injures himself in the junkyard.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred invites his fiancee and a door-to-door saleswoman to dinner on the same evening.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: When Fred receives a slight injury in a car mishap, Lamont hires a housekeeper to help out.

programme.title: The Bobby DeBarge Story
programme.desc: The singer struggles with fame and fortune while coping with his dysfunctional childhood.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Adonis elicits jealousy from Fabian when his boyfriend recruits him for a dance competition; it appears that she is placing him in the closet again.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.sub-title: Get the Hell Out Before I Delout
programme.desc: Delroy's wildly-successful former-protégé buys out Del Jones Realty; a game night with the gang at the condo goes terribly wrong and turns everyone against each other.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Jasmine gets serious with Terrence but discovers that he's a wanted drug dealer.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The numbers king of the neighborhood commissions J.J. to paint a portrait.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Michael's research for a bicentennial report leads to strange happenings for the Evans family.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo is inspired by a school speaker and asks his parents for flying lessons.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Vanessa is labeled a conceited rich girl after two girls visit her home.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise tries to explain to her parents why she received a below-average grade on an English paper.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Rudy finds a lost dog, but has trouble letting go when its owner comes to get it.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine becomes a juror in a high-profile case; Synclaire helps an unemployed actor.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Kyle attends his high-school reunion and confronts the school bully, who is leading a rather grim existence.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: I've Got You Under My Skin
programme.desc: Regine helps a couple plan a graveyard wedding; Khadijah dates her anesthesiologist.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Quarterback Jeff Blake mistakenly attends Max and Gary's dinner party.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When the grisly remains of a beloved football coach are found in his Texas home, detectives and loved ones desperately search for answers.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: These high school sweethearts were on the verge of having it all, when one of them suddenly disappeared; police suspect he left by choice until a grisly discovery in the woods uncovers a darker story hiding beneath the surface of his idyllic life.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A high school freshman falls in love for the first time when she meets an edgy troublemaker; she becomes desperate to show him her love has no bounds; she discovers there's a fine line between proving your love and going too far.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman who is committed to her faith is lured in by the idea of holy matrimony; she soon learns that her "man of God" is no saint; his violent temper leads her down a road of crime, abuse and destruction.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A beautiful bartender believes she has found her soulmate when she is charmed by an up-and-coming rapper; when a fun night out takes a shockingly violent turn, she decides to put her man first and sacrifice everything to protect him.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Dwayne and Ron's friendship is strained after they pledge a fraternity.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Walter becomes jealous when Jaleesa's ex-husband, Lamar, shows up.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Kim takes on too many responsibilities; Mr. Gaines (Lou Myers) moves in with Col. Taylor (Glynn Turman).

programme.sub-title: Take This Job and Love It
programme.desc: Kim gets Whitley a job at the Pit to help pay for the car she damaged.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Rudy finds a lost dog, but has trouble letting go when its owner comes to get it.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Laz Alonso reveals his journey from Washington, D.C. to Hollywood; leaving Wall Street to pursue acting, breaking through stereotypes, and landing major roles in Avatar, Jumping the Broom, and The Boys.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Blair Underwood strips away the Hollywood shine, confronting the battles with stereotypes, the tough choices that tested him, and the drive that made him a star with purpose.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Denise has to live with the repercussions of breaking one of the monitor's new rules; she has to wear a pig mask on a date.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Dwayne tutors Denise in calculus late into the night and is forced to leave the locked all female dormitory via the fire escape; the problem is, the only way to get to the only unlocked exit is through Whitley's room.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Maggie and Whitley debate on how women should balance a career and family life; Dwayne tries to get a campus DJ job.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Denise's little sister Rudy visits Hillman and makes Whitley her new role model.

programme.desc: Laz Alonso reveals his journey from Washington, D.C. to Hollywood; leaving Wall Street to pursue acting, breaking through stereotypes, and landing major roles in Avatar, Jumping the Broom, and The Boys.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.sub-title: Sometimes You Get the Bear ... Sometimes the Bear Gets You
programme.desc: Denise's grandfather comes for a visit during homecoming weekend; she worries that her grandfather will discover she is involved in a homecoming prank.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.sub-title: If Chosen, I May Not Run
programme.desc: Like her father and grandfather before her, Denise joins the Hillman track team; but to her dismay it turns out to be more than she bargained for.

programme.desc: Denise has a crush on her geology professor.

programme.desc: Jaleesa takes bets on how Dwayne will act when a graduate student tries to seduce him.

programme.title: Welcome to the Family
programme.desc: Stella Brooks becomes caught up in the world of media mania, and spends a weekend at her family reunion with all of her crazy relatives.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.sub-title: You Don't Have to Go Home, But..
programme.desc: Latrell returns a favor to Armando; Bridget finds a ring in Delroy's office and assumes he's planning on proposing.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Imunique agrees to throw a bachelorette party for DeMiracle's fiance.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Jasmine attends Suckers Anonymous after being victimized one too many times; Cordell attempts to respond to a bully by packing a gun.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: When an old girlfriend visits J.J., she brings along some upsetting news.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Fed up with being treated like a servant by her family, Florida accepts a luncheon invitation from a man.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff's father and his Army buddies trade war stories during a card game.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff and his father take charge of the household while Clair and her mother-in-law are visiting Denise at college.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Elvin uses Cliff to demonstrate a wrestling move, and shares a secret with Theo.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff's parents invite Rudy to spend the night at their house.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Synclaire realizes her true talent when she stands in as the lead in a play.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Khadijah and her new beau attend a holiday event with the snobbish medical elite.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: Do You Take This Man's Wallet?
programme.desc: Regine coordinates her ex-boyfriend's wedding and becomes convinced he is marrying the wrong woman.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine's mother dates a debonair gentleman; Synclaire avoids Overton's new car.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: He moved to New York to pursue the American dream, and became successful beyond his wildest imagination; but when a violent attack turns the dream into a nightmare, police must untangle a sinister web of financial crimes and murderous envy.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: Lifelong friends Whitney Caraway and Amanda Porter are closer than sisters; growing up in a dangerous area, the two relied on each other for stability, security and love; but when a man creates a rift between the friends, betrayal turns deadly.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: After a painful divorce, a single mother didn't expect to ever love again; after a charming stranger wins her heart, she becomes desperate to do anything to keep her new man's love.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman finds solace in a new boyfriend after her father passes away; he ropes her into one of his criminal schemes; she finds herself in the midst of a brutal blood bath.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a young mother reunites with her childhood crush, but her new man is guarding a deadly secret that will put her and her son's lives in danger; when she gets caught in the crosshairs, she must choose to save her man or herself.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Dwayne fears Freddie may face date rape when she goes out with an aggressive athlete (Taimak).

programme.desc: Ron claims that Dwayne has Jesse Jackson's endorsement for student government president.

programme.sub-title: Say Hello to a Good Buy
programme.desc: Cliff must bargain with a tough salesman when he goes to buy a new car.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise anxiously awaits the arrival of her blind date; Vanessa's ex-boyfriend wants to win her back.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff is called to the hospital for three deliveries; Theo is left in charge at home.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.sub-title: You Only Hurt the One You Love
programme.desc: Theo accidentally hurts Rudy after convincing her to play circus with him.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise worries about her soon-to-be-married pregnant friend, and throws her a bridal shower.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise and Sondra come home from college to celebrate their father's 50th birthday.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Sondra and Elvin announce their engagement; Theo plays practical jokes on the family.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo offers to run the house when Cliff and Clair have the flu.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff's longtime friend (Robert Culp) flies in from Chicago for a visit.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff treats Rudy and her friends to lunch at an expensive restaurant.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: The Huxtables visit Hillman College to celebrate the retirement of the school's president.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Sondra and Elvin return from their honeymoon with surprising news for the Huxtables.
